title: gnaphalium unionis
intro: Gnaphalium unionis, also known as the Silver Ragwort or Union Island Gnaphalium, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Gnaphalium unionis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various conditions, such as skin irritations and respiratory problems.
